title: Vinyl Frontier
description: A new Musical ore with some interesting uses!
body:
[![Bisect Hosting Link](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/8a5f8695-7e4f-42ee-aff9-a44f49663696.png)](https://shorturl.at/xbl6X)

This Mod is for Fabric, Forge may come one day, but don't count on it

Discord Server for talking about my mods, update progress, or reporting bugs/issues: Click Here

 

What is Vinyl Frontier?

Vinyl Frontier is a mod containing features related to a new ore, Vinyllium. Vinyllium was originally a feature of an old low-quality mod of mine called Choconilla (which I've decided to revisit and redo some of the content from). Vinyllium's main gimmick is as an ingredient for music discs, but it also has other uses.

Music Disc Crafting


Once you mine up enough Vinyllium Shards, you can use them to craft blank music discs. Blank Music discs can then be turned into music discs via the brand-new Disc Burner!

 

Disc Burner comes packaged with REI support, and support for custom recipes!

 

Harmonic Spring

 

The harmonic spring is 2 features in 1, and extension to Noteblock Sounds, and a means of launching oneself into the air. It requires redstone power to function, but once powered it will launch entities vertically into the air (with the launch being determined by the redstone signal). The Launch also plays a sound from the mob based on the block it's on.

 

 


Blocks breakable by a pickaxe play the hurt sound,

Blocks breakable by an axe play the ambient sound (unless an entity doesn't have one, of which it will default to the death sound)

Any other block will play the death sound

 

Music Sheets

 

Music Sheets are an item that will come in handy to anyone building with noteblocks. Using a music sheet, you can shift right-click on a Note Block or Harmonic Spring in order to store the note from the block. If you put it in your offhand, all note blocks and harmonic springs will automatically be tuned. 

 

Other Features

 

- Vinyllium blocks for building, offering a black alternative to quartz

- Warp Whistles, a expensive flute item used to teleport to your spawn point

 

 



FAQ

 

Q: What're future plans for this mod?
A: It'll be worked on whenever I have an idea that I think would fit, otherwise it'll mainly be bug fixes and new Minecraft versions
Q: Forge?

A: Maybe, Forge isn't my cup of tea
